name: Monterey Spaghetti
recipeIngredient: 1 10 oz package frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained
1 2.8 oz can French fried onions (Durkees), divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti according to package directions.
2. In a medium bowl, beat the egg.
3. Add sour cream, Parmesan cheese, and garlic powder to the beaten egg.
4. Drain the cooked spaghetti and add it to the egg mixture.
5. Add Monterey Jack cheese, thawed spinach, and half of the onions to the dish.
6. Pour into a greased 2-quart baking dish and cover.
7. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes or until heated through.
8. Top with remaining onions; return to the oven for an additional 5 minutes or until the onions are golden brown.
9. Serves 6 to 8.
